[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000100 1
1 110010100 4
2 101000011 4
3 000001011 3
4 000000000 a
5 111000010 4
6 110100011 5
7 001100000 2

01 10 010001000 2
12 21 001101001 4
23 32 111000011 5
34 43 011100100 4
45 54 100010000 2
56 65 001010011 4
67 76 011011100 5
70 07 001011001 4

02 20 011100001 4
13 31 110101010 5
24 42 100100111 5
35 53 111110100 6
46 64 101000011 4 match 2
57 75 010001111 5
60 06 010000101 3
71 17 011010001 4

50 05 011010110 5
61 16 000001101 3
72 27 010111000 4
